price: Segensreich ist der Name deines Herrn, Besitzer der Erhabenheit und Ehre!
arabic: تَبَٰرَكَ ٱسۡمُ رَبِّكَ ذِي ٱلۡجَلَٰلِ وَٱلۡإِكۡرَامِ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: tabāraka us'mu rabbika dhī al-jalāli wal-ik'rāmi
